name: Vukile Property Fund Limited
summary: Vukile Property Fund Limited is a property company, which was listed on the JSE Limited on 24 June 2004 ( JSE code : VKE ) and on the Namibian Stock Exchange on 11 July 2007 ( NSX code : VKN ). Vukile's market capitalisation was approximately R11.0 billion at 31 March 2015 and its property portfolio was valued at R13.3 billion at year-end. There were 572 747 744 shares in issue at year-end. on 1 April 2013, Vukile became the first property company to be awarded Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) status by the JSE Limited.
